THECURSEDMOD-RITE.title: Rite
THECURSEDMOD-RITE.description: When using, choose 1 card to [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. Selecting a [gold]Curse[/gold] card will trigger the [gold]Rite[/gold]'s effect.
THECURSEDMOD-KARMA.title: Karma
THECURSEDMOD-KARMA.description: At the end of your next turn, take that much damage.
THECURSEDMOD-CIRCLE.title: Circle
THECURSEDMOD-CIRCLE.description: A card that can be triggered by using other cards while in [gold]Hand[/gold].
